chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Affection for Women

text: رِوَايَةِ أَبَانٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "مَا أَظُنُّ رَجُلاً يَزْدَادُ فِي اَلْإِيمَانِ خَيْراً إِلاَّ اِزْدَادَ حُبّاً لِلنِّسَاءِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4351 - In a narration from Aban, from Umar ibn Yazid, Abu Abdillah (as) said: "I do not think that a man increases in faith and goodness except that he also increases in love for women."
